title: Stone Guide
content:
She was fading -
        into the stone
        into rifled shadows heavy
        with fallen light,
        rippled boughs
        of splitting fruit &
        droopy leaves
        to a sallow body under clumsy years
        that ripped the tunic of her coat
        while bleating the dismal age
        with each petal fall
        of a stockinged foot.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Stone Guide"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
